text: China urges 'restraint' in Ukraine war after Russian hypersonic missile strike - Glenda KWEK, Glenda KWEK - Updated [Comments](/china-urges-restraint-in-ukraine-war-after-russian-hypersonic-missile-strike/image_3f153bec-a34e-5c5d-bb1c-d069ed2e34a1.html#comments) Tags As featured on Russian President Vladimir Putin on Friday promised more combat test-firing of an experimental hypersonic missile launched at Ukraine, as Volodymyr Zelensky appealed for updated air-defence systems to meet the new threat.
